headline: Mastercard Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Mastercard (NYSE:MA) reported what Chief Executive Officer Michael Miebach called an “excellent start” to fiscal 2026, with first-quarter net revenue up 12% and net income up 15% year over year on a non-GAAP, currency-neutral basis.
